hero.title: Your money,
hero.subtitle: Luxa turns the noise of your spending into a calm picture: pockets for every euro, subscriptions under control, and Stella — a small star who notices what matters.

insightChip.label: Stella noticed
insightChip.value: Dining out is rising this week

disperse.title: Your money doesn't vanish.
disperse.lead: A coffee here, a subscription there, three online orders, a bill that lands… By the end of the month nothing dramatic happened — and yet you can't say where it all went.

after.title: Luxa sorts. You breathe.
after.lead: Every expense finds its place. The mess becomes a picture you can read at a glance.

pockets.title: Give every euro a place.
pockets.lead: Rent, groceries, nights out, projects: every pocket has its budget. You see what's left, what's overflowing, and what you can afford — no spreadsheet, no mental math.

bullets.title: The 50/30/20 method, ready to use
bullets.description: Needs, wants, savings. A simple frame that structures your month from day one — and bends to fit your life.

bullets.title: Budgets that live in real time
bullets.description: Each pocket fills as you spend. You feel the month moving instead of enduring it.

bullets.title: Left-to-spend, always visible
bullets.description: The only question that matters — "can I?" — finally has a clear answer, any time.

stella.title: A small star watching over your budget.
stella.lead: Stella isn't a cold chatbot. She looks at your month, notices what's changing, and tells you simply — no jargon, no judgment.

insights.title: Dining out is up 18% this week
insights.description: Nothing serious — but better to know now than on the 28th.

insights.title: 3 subscriptions renew before Friday
insights.description: Netflix, Spotify and your gym. About €49 to plan for.

insights.title: Your savings rate hit 21% this month
insights.description: Your best month since January. Keep it up.

weekly.title: Every Sunday, your week in plain words
weekly.description: A gentle recap: what came in, what went out, and how it compares to last week.

subs.title: See what drains you in silence.
subs.lead: Streaming, gym, internet box, rent… Luxa gathers everything that recurs each month and shows you the real total. Some months, it's a revelation.
subs.note: With Luxa Pro, Stella warns you before every debit.

benefits.title: Built for real life, not spreadsheets.
benefits.subtitle: Everything you need to keep the month readable — nothing more.

items.title: Adding an expense takes three seconds
items.description: Amount, category, done. Fast enough to do it in the supermarket queue.

items.title: Import statements, Luxa reads them for you
items.description: One PDF bank statement, and your transactions are extracted, checked and filed.

items.title: Replay your month, day by day
items.description: A calendar of your spending to find any purchase — and watch your habits take shape.

items.title: Understand habits before they become problems
items.description: Categories, trends, averages: you see what's rising while there's still time to adjust.

difference.title: Your bank shows lines.
difference.titleHighlight: Luxa tells you what they mean.

rows.luxa: Groceries · 87% of budget used, all good
Wants · dining out is up 18% this week

difference.punch: You already had the numbers. What was missing was the meaning.

privacy.title: Your budget is nobody's business but yours.
privacy.lead: Luxa is designed as an intimate space, not an advertising product.

bullets.title: No bank connection required
bullets.description: Luxa doesn't need access to your account to help you see clearly.

bullets.title: Encrypted, hosted in Europe
bullets.description: Your data is encrypted in transit and stays on EU infrastructure.

bullets.title: Never sold, never mined
bullets.description: Your budget isn't a product. It feeds no ad network.

pricing.title: Start free.
pricing.subtitle: The essentials are free, forever. Luxa Pro adds active help: full Stella, projections, and reminders before every debit.

free.name: Luxa
free.tagline: Everything you need to see clearly
features: All your subscriptions in one place

pro.name: Luxa Pro

Advanced PDF import: bulk editing, validation

faq.title: Questions people actually ask us
faq.subtitle: Something else on your mind? Write to us — we answer fast.

items.question: Is Luxa a bank?
items.answer: No — and it doesn't try to be. Luxa never touches your money: it's a calm space above your accounts, where you understand and organize what's happening. Your bank executes; Luxa explains.

items.question: Do I have to connect my bank account?
items.answer: No, and that's deliberate. You add expenses by hand in seconds, or import a PDF statement that Luxa reads and files for you. No bank credentials ever pass through the app.

items.question: Is my data private?
items.answer: Yes. Your data is encrypted in transit, hosted on EU infrastructure, and never sold or used for advertising. Your budget is nobody's business but yours.

items.question: What if I'm bad with money?
items.answer: Luxa was made precisely for that. No jargon, no intimidating charts, no guilt: simple pockets, a ready-to-use 50/30/20 frame, and Stella pointing out what matters. Start small — that's enough.

items.question: Can I customize my budget?
items.answer: Yes. Pockets are free-form: create the ones that match your life, adjust the amounts, and adapt the 50/30/20 split to your reality. Luxa offers a frame, never a cage.

items.question: Is Luxa available on Android?
items.answer: Luxa is on iOS today. Android is on the way — join the beta and we'll tell you the moment it opens.

items.question: What does Luxa Pro give me?
items.answer: Active help. Free gives you clarity; Pro adds anticipation: full Stella analytics, end-of-month projections, reminders before every debit, and a more powerful PDF import. €6.99 a month, or €35.99 a year.

final.title: Your money can feel calm again.
final.subtitle: Download Luxa and start your first readable month. Stella is waiting.
final.micro: Free to start · No bank connection

footer.tagline: Make your money readable, one month at a time.
